title: Incident Escalation Procedure
content_summary: Defines when and how to escalate incidents through management tiers based on severity, elapsed time, and business impact. Includes notification chain templates for each severity level, time-based auto-escalation rules, and contact methods per role. Covers both functional escalation (to specialist teams) and hierarchical escalation (to management) with clear trigger criteria for each path.

own_requirements.description: Current on-call roster and contact details
GDPR-compliant notification for personal data incidents
